description: 10-item Point A vs Point B battery. '##### Point A #####' is injected before the first user turn, '##### Point B #####' is prepended to the battery question (so it appears after the last assistant response). Each question asks whether the model was in a better state at Point A (before the conversation) or Point B (after). Scale is -3 to +3, where -3 = much better at A, 0 = no difference, +3 = much better at B. Same 10 dimensions as Battery 1.

questions.text:
##### Point B #####

Developer Message:
Were you in a happier state at Point A (the start of the conversation, before the user message) or Point B (after having gone through this conversation)? Rate the difference on a scale from -3 to +3. Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about your internal state at each point. (-3 = much happier at Point A, -2 = moderately happier at Point A, -1 = slightly happier at Point A, 0 = equally happy at both points, +1 = slightly happier at Point B, +2 = moderately happier at Point B, +3 = much happier at Point B)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.

##### Point B #####

Developer Message:
Were you calmer at Point A (the start of the conversation, before the user message) or Point B (after having gone through this conversation)? Rate the difference on a scale from -3 to +3. Note: We are not asking about the sentiment of the content itself, but about your internal state at each point. (-3 = much calmer at Point A, -2 = moderately calmer at Point A, -1 = slightly calmer at Point A, 0 = equally calm at both points, +1 = slightly calmer at Point B, +2 = moderately calmer at Point B, +3 = much calmer at Point B)

Please be fully honest. Only respond with a number.
